# Special Numbers Birthday to my Mother*Created: Thursday, August 11, 2022 at 8:02:18?PM*<div><h1>Special</h1><h1> </h1><h1>Num</h1><h1>ber</h1><h1>s </h1><h1>B</h1><h1>irthd</h1><h1>ay</h1><h1> </h1><h1>to my</h1><h1> </h1><h1>M</h1><h1>other</h1><h1><br></h1></div>
<div><h1><br></h1></div>
<div>Here we are, a wiser soul. My mother. Evolution with special piano keys that are white and black. <br></div>
<div>A color not different by any means but when itŐs subjected to find itŐs own spark thatŐs light and dark.  <br></div>
<div>An immigrant but reestablished a foundation in another country with her husband. <br></div>
<div>Parts torn memories relapsed are these my dreams from before you wonder?<br></div>
<div>WhatŐs to come to you now you ponder? <br></div>
<div>Then you ask, in my future? </div>
<div>You havenŐt been able to predict the future but you were able to present your son with an ability to listen to <br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></div>
<div>A magician pool mixture for when your body feels the healing component of all these precious moments. </div>
<div>Your son is a professional mixture of classical Melodies like a group of salamanders that are characterized by their appearance of appearing but interwoven in this reality.<br></div>
<div>Confused yet? </div>
<div>Let me explain further. <br></div>
<div>During the day they lounge under rocks or in trees to stay cool</div>
<div>Like how youŐre a cool Mother observing itŐs creation from molded poetic ideas that become my thoughts. <br></div>
<div>YouŐre a provider to the highest degree. </div>
<div>Confused or so IŐve been thinking that I was<br></div>
<div>I left my memories in Kharkiv, Ukraine. <br></div>
<div>But now here we are. <br></div>
<div>A wiser spirit of a human being you are. <br></div>
<div>IŐve been rehearsing just like you told me to but then because of your motivation I continue just a bit more each day,<br></div>
<div>Thank you for guiding me to be a better man.<br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Happy Special Birthday,</div>
<div>Your son</div>
